title: cyclophyllum novoguineensis
intro: Cyclophyllum novoguineensis, also known as the 'New Guinea cyclophyllum', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a tropical plant native to New Guinea, and its bark and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems. Cyclophyllum novoguineensis is prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
